workstreams.write_owner: ChatGPT conversation: ServiceTracer — Governed Azure Operations Lab
workstreams.scope: Select and formalize the OS-disk snapshot-and-recreation rollback strategy and canonical OS-disk naming in repository contracts, validation, tests, review documentation, and project coordination state only. Permitted paths: infra/replacement/collector-replacement-contract.json, infra/replacement/validate_execution_design.py, infra/tests/test_collector_replacement_execution_design.py, docs/designs/collector-replacement-execution.md, docs/reviews/collector-replacement-rollback-decision-2026-07-21.md, .project/active-work.json, and .project/handoffs/current-state.md. Protected paths: .github/workflows/**, infra/modules/**, application source, credentials, and Azure mutation scripts.
workstreams.next_gate: CI must prove the selected rollback contract remains fail-closed, preserves the canonical OS-disk name, requires independently verified OS and evidence-disk recovery points before old compute removal, and keeps workflow promotion and Azure mutations unauthorized. Then obtain independent operations-and-recovery review.

known_open_pull_requests.title: feat: scaffold Azure network foundation
known_open_pull_requests.action: Do not treat as current implementation work. Review for unique durable evidence, then close as superseded through a separate explicit action.

known_open_pull_requests.title: Select snapshot-based collector rollback strategy
known_open_pull_requests.action: Keep draft until CI passes and an independent operations-and-recovery review evaluates the selected snapshot/recreation strategy.

required_gates: select OS-disk snapshot and deterministic recreation as the rollback strategy
retain the canonical OS-disk name disk-stcollector-os-mst-dev
prove contract validation rejects missing or weakened rollback fields
require fresh preflight capture of OS-disk source identity, size, generation, security type, encryption, and access policy
require independent verification of both evidence-disk and OS-disk recovery points before old compute removal
retain NIC and evidence-disk preservation, identity/RBAC, cost, cleanup, and four-lens review blockers
promotion occurs only through a separate authority-changing pull request
next_bounded_operation.next_gate: Complete repository-only rollback design and CI. Do not move the candidate into .github/workflows, authenticate to Azure, create snapshots, change delete options, delete or create resources, or claim operational rollback verification.
